issues.sample: The contact owns a 2021 BMW X1. The contact stated that while driving at approximately 65 mph, another vehicle crashed into the front passenger side of the vehicle. The contact mentioned the air bags failed to deploy from the intensity of the vehicle. A police report was filed. T

narrative.headline: What 2021 Bmw X1 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
